race.comment: NICCY'S AFFAIR (9) is looking for the hat-trick following a strong win over the 1000m journey last time out, winning by 0.3L. Back out in trip is the query, but she was good over this track and trip first-up. Can sit handy from the draw and if she can hold her form, the hat-trick beckons. CRUISE TO RIO (2) got the job done last start in an impressive effort from the back of the pack, with NICCY'S AFFAIR going on and franking that form since. She maps to sit closer today from a better draw and she boasts a great record at this track and trip. Can beat NICCY'S AFFAIR again. BRAVE APACHE (10) got back to his best last start with a 1.2L defeat as a 25-1 chance when sitting on the speed. A better draw this time suits and he drops plenty of weight. Can feature again. TOP OF THE POPS (11) looks an improver stepping out in distance today and a forward showing is on the cards. SACRED OATH (7) can bounce back to form dropping in trip off a freshen.
